import { Campaign } from '@/features/campaigns/types';

type Seed = [string, string, number, string, string, string, string, string, string, string];

const seeds: Seed[] = [
  ['nova-skin', 'Sephora', 120, '2026-05-02', 'Show the glow reset', 'Film a clear morning routine that keeps the serum front and center.', 'Open with the bottle in hand', 'Mention the skin payoff in your voiceover', 'coffee-street', 'planner-close'],
  ['pulse-matcha', 'MatchaBar', 95, '2026-05-04', 'Make the ritual feel easy', 'Create a calm kitchen sequence that turns the matcha whisk into the hero shot.', 'Show the pour and the final color', 'Keep the pacing under 25 seconds', 'coffee-seat', 'planner-open'],
  ['luma-pet', 'BarkBox', 140, '2026-05-05', 'Capture an everyday win', 'Feature the treat jar during a real pet moment with natural sound and movement.', 'Lead with the pet reaction', 'End on a clean product close-up', 'fitness-home', 'coffee-street'],
  ['north-lane', 'Away', 110, '2026-05-06', 'Pack for a weekend away', 'Show how the bag handles a full day with quick transitions and practical hooks.', 'Highlight storage in the first 5 seconds', 'Use an outdoor or street setting', 'travel-suitcase', 'coffee-seat'],
  ['sundae-labs', 'Halo Top', 150, '2026-05-07', 'Turn dessert into a reveal', 'Build a playful prep sequence that lands on the finished scoop and flavor reaction.', 'Show texture before the taste test', 'Call out the featured flavor', 'coffee-street', 'box-packing'],
  ['wildform', 'Nike', 130, '2026-05-08', 'Make movement the proof', 'Shoot a lightweight fitness story that shows the product in motion, not on a shelf.', 'Use at least one moving camera shot', 'Keep the brand mention natural', 'fitness-home', 'travel-suitcase'],
  ['bloom-note', 'Moleskine', 85, '2026-05-09', 'Romanticize the desk reset', 'Create a tidy workspace transformation anchored around the planner and one daily habit.', 'Start with the messy before', 'End with one written page', 'planner-open', 'planner-close'],
  ['dune-cafe', 'Blue Bottle', 100, '2026-05-10', 'Sell the first sip', 'Capture a warm coffee moment that feels local, quick, and genuinely useful.', 'Get steam or pour detail on camera', 'Use one line of on-screen text max', 'coffee-street', 'coffee-seat'],
  ['halo-home', 'Philips Hue', 170, '2026-05-11', 'Show the room difference', 'Build a before-and-after sequence around the lamp and the atmosphere it changes.', 'Include the room before the light turns on', 'Keep cuts slow and clean', 'planner-open', 'travel-suitcase'],
  ['field-day', 'KIND', 90, '2026-05-12', 'Make snack prep feel social', 'Film a shared snack setup with quick hand shots and one satisfying final platter.', 'Keep faces optional', 'End with the branded pack visible', 'box-packing', 'coffee-seat'],
  ['merit-cycle', 'Rapha', 145, '2026-05-13', 'Commute with confidence', 'Show how the gear fits into a real ride with utility and pace.', 'Include one moving POV shot', 'Mention one practical feature', 'travel-suitcase', 'fitness-home'],
  ['kind-press', 'Glossier', 105, '2026-05-14', 'Make the unboxing tactile', 'Create a creator-style unboxing with crisp sounds and two hero close-ups.', 'No more than three cuts before reveal', 'Hold the product steady for the final frame', 'box-packing', 'planner-close'],
  ['terra-drop', 'SodaStream', 125, '2026-05-15', 'Frame the refill habit', 'Center the product in a simple refill routine that feels repeatable and easy.', 'Open on the empty container', 'Close on the refill in use', 'coffee-street', 'box-packing'],
  ['social-spark', 'Notion', 160, '2026-05-16', 'Pitch the workflow shift', 'Tell a mini story about the old workflow versus the faster new one.', 'Use one spoken line about time saved', 'Keep the ending screen readable', 'planner-open', 'planner-close'],
  ['april-audio', 'Sony', 135, '2026-05-17', 'Sell the listening moment', 'Shoot a lived-in scene where the headphones change the mood immediately.', 'Show the product before it is worn', 'Use environment sound before music starts', 'coffee-seat', 'fitness-home'],
  ['cinder-care', 'Cetaphil', 92, '2026-05-18', 'Build trust with routine', 'Create a bathroom shelf story that feels clean, helpful, and repeatable.', 'Keep the counter uncluttered', 'Mention one practical outcome', 'coffee-street', 'planner-open'],
  ['atlas-roam', 'Samsonite', 180, '2026-05-19', 'Earn the travel save', 'Show how the organizer solves a travel pain point in under 30 seconds.', 'Use packing or airport context', 'Include one wide shot and one detail shot', 'travel-suitcase', 'box-packing'],
  ['thread-form', 'Everlane', 115, '2026-05-20', 'Style it three ways', 'Film one item across multiple looks with quick transitions and consistent framing.', 'Start with the hanger or folded item', 'End on the strongest full-body look', 'fitness-home', 'coffee-seat'],
  ['mint-mobile', 'Mint Mobile', 155, '2026-05-21', 'Make the switch feel easy', 'Explain the offer through a simple day-in-the-life moment and one strong CTA.', 'Lead with the problem being solved', 'Keep the value prop in plain language', 'travel-suitcase', 'planner-close'],
  ['oak-studio', 'IKEA', 98, '2026-05-22', 'Show the setup payoff', 'Build a cozy home setup sequence that lands on the finished scene and one useful detail.', 'Open with the blank space', 'Keep text overlays to one phrase', 'planner-open', 'coffee-street'],
];

const logoMap: Record<string, string> = {
  Sephora: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/sephora.com',
  MatchaBar: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/matchabar.co',
  BarkBox: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/barkbox.com',
  Away: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/awaytravel.com',
  'Halo Top': 'https://logo.clearbit.com/halotop.com',
  Nike: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/nike.com',
  Moleskine: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/moleskine.com',
  'Blue Bottle': 'https://logo.clearbit.com/bluebottlecoffee.com',
  'Philips Hue': 'https://logo.clearbit.com/philips-hue.com',
  KIND: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/kindsnacks.com',
  Rapha: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/rapha.cc',
  Glossier: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/glossier.com',
  SodaStream: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/sodastream.com',
  Notion: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/notion.so',
  Sony: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/sony.com',
  Cetaphil: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/cetaphil.com',
  Samsonite: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/samsonite.com',
  Everlane: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/everlane.com',
  'Mint Mobile': 'https://logo.clearbit.com/mintmobile.com',
  IKEA: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/ikea.com',
};

export const campaigns: Campaign[] = seeds.map(
  ([id, brandName, payoutUsd, deadlineIso, headline, brief, req1, req2, videoA, videoB]) => ({
    id,
    brandName,
    logoUrl: logoMap[brandName],
    payoutUsd,
    deadlineIso,
    headline,
    brief,
    requirements: [req1, req2],
    exampleVideoIds: [videoA, videoB],
  })
);
